detaileddescription.para: This directory owns x86_64-specific kernel/platform implementation for the GRUB boot path: early boot assembly, linker script, CPU/IRQ/VM glue, userspace entry, and current x86-backed storage/filesystem adapters.
The tools/embedded/x86_64_grub_slint directory consumes this source to build bootable test images. It should contain image packaging and target configuration only, not platform source ownership.
